reference: I SHOULD HAVE GIVEN IT TO YOU LAST NIGHT AFTER DINNER ONLY IT HAPPENED TO BE A CREAM JUG AND YOU SEEMED ANNOYED AT HAVING SO MANY DUPLICATES SO I FELT RATHER AWKWARD ABOUT GIVING YOU ANOTHER
text: i should have given it to you last night after dinner only it happened to be a green jug and you seemed annoyed at having so many duplicates so i felt rather awkward about giving you another
